name.description: The name of the Cloudwatch event rule

description.description: The description of the Cloudwatch event rule

schedule_expression.description: The schedule expression for the Cloudwatch event rule. For example, cron(0 20 * * ? *) or rate(5 minutes)

event_pattern.description: The event pattern for the Cloudwatch event rule.

event_bus_name.description: The event bus to associate with the rule. If you omit this, the default event bus is used.

role_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) associated with the role that is used for target invocation

state.description: Indicates whether the rule is enabled or disabled

tags.description: The list of tags to apply to the Cloudwatch event rule
